nasb.text: They were enrolled by genealogy, according to their generations, heads of their fathers’ households, 20,200 mighty men of valor.

esv.text: And their enrollment by genealogies, according to their generations, as heads of their fathers’ houses, mighty warriors, was 20,200.

cnv.text: 他們都是各家族的首領，是英勇的戰士，按著家譜登記的，共有二萬零二百人。

ccb.text: 比结的儿子都是族长。按家谱的记载，他们宗族共有两万零二百个英勇的战士。
